Built for dental practices

Your AI receptionist that answers every call and fills your calendar.

Stop losing patients to voicemail. We set up AI that answers calls after hours, books appointments automatically, and follows up with patients so your front desk can breathe.

15-minute call. We'll show you exactly what yours would handle.

Compatible with all major practice management platforms

DENTRIXEAGLESOFTOPEN DENTALCURVE DENTALDENTICON& more

What we build

Three systems to stop losing patients to voicemail.

AI Patient Handoff

Every call gets answered, even when your front desk is busy or the office is closed. Our AI handles the conversation, books directly into your practice software, and notifies your team in real time.

  • Missed calls answered automatically
  • Appointments booked 24/7
  • Voicemails transcribed & forwarded
  • HIPAA-conscious design

Appointment Reminders

Automatic SMS and email reminders reduce no-shows. If a patient needs to reschedule, they can do it without calling your office.

Follow-Up Automation

When patients miss appointments, we follow up automatically. Recare reminders, outstanding treatment outreach, and reactivation campaigns keep your schedule full.

How it works

From missed call to booked patient, without lifting a finger.

Here's what happens when a patient calls after hours or when your front desk is tied up.

1

Patient calls your office

Any time of day or night, weekday or weekend.

2

AI answers within 3 rings

A natural voice, not a frustrating menu tree.

3

Appointment booked directly

Syncs to your practice software in real time.

4

Confirmation sent automatically

Patient receives SMS and email confirmation.

5

Your team stays informed

Get notified of new bookings and urgent matters.

6

Patient shows up

Or if they don't, we follow up automatically.

Complex or urgent? Those calls get forwarded to your team immediately with full context. You always stay in control.

Why we exist

Built by operators who saw the problem firsthand.

I spent years watching good businesses lose revenue to a problem that shouldn't exist: unanswered calls. Not because they didn't care, but because staffing a phone line 24/7 is impossible for most practices.

AI changed what's possible. For the first time, a small team can offer the responsiveness of a 24/7 call center without the overhead. But most solutions are built for enterprises and priced accordingly.

We started with dental practices because they need this most. Calls come in all day, emergencies happen after hours, and every missed call is a patient who books somewhere else. Your front desk team is already stretched thin. You shouldn't have to choose between answering phones and helping the patients in front of you.

ZoltFlow exists to make sure no patient slips through the cracks, and no dental team has to drown in phones to make it happen.

Dr. Sarah Chen

Founder, ZoltFlow

Dr. Sarah Chen

Founder & CEO

Why AI automation

Modern AI can handle real conversations, not just menu trees. It can understand intent, handle objections, and book appointments the way a trained receptionist would.

Why dental practices

Dental offices get dozens of calls daily, plus emergencies after hours. One missed call often means losing a patient to a competitor who answered.

Why now

The technology has matured, but most solutions are still built for large enterprises. We're making it accessible for independent practices.

What to expect

We're building our first dental case studies.

Here's what we typically see in similar implementations. On your discovery call, we'll estimate specific numbers for your practice based on your call volume and current setup.

Missed calls handled

Every after-hours and overflow call answered. No voicemail, no lost patients.

More appointments booked

Patients book directly through conversation, even when your office is closed.

Hours returned to your team

Your front desk focuses on patients in the office, not tied to the phones.

Reduced no-shows

Automatic reminders and easy rescheduling keep your schedule full.

Want to be among our first dental case studies? We're offering priority implementation to our founding practices.

Pricing

Two options, depending on what you need.

We'll discuss pricing on your call once we understand your call volume and requirements. No commitment until you know exactly what you're getting.

AI Patient Handoff

Most practices start here

After-hours and overflow call handling with appointment booking.

  • 24/7 call answering
  • Appointments booked directly into your software
  • Voicemail transcription and forwarding
  • Staff training session
  • 30 days of support included

Full Practice Automation

Complete patient communication system with reminders, follow-ups, and reactivation.

  • Everything in AI Patient Handoff
  • Appointment reminder system (SMS & email)
  • No-show follow-up automation
  • Recare and reactivation campaigns
  • Monthly performance review

Not sure which you need? We'll help you figure that out on the call.
